description: GitHub Actions / GitLab CI injection + pwn-request patterns. Probed via poutine / octoscan binaries (run_poutine / run_octoscan), not HTTP matchers.

expression_injection.description: Untrusted input interpolated into a shell run: step via ${{ github.event.* }} -> command injection.

pwn_request.description: pull_request_target with checkout of PR head SHA -> RCE on default branch context with write secrets.

untrusted_checkout.description: Workflow_run / workflow_dispatch reusing untrusted artifact from triggering workflow.

unpinned_third_party_action.description: Third-party action referenced by tag (v1) not full SHA -> supply-chain hijack window.

self_hosted_runner_takeover.description: Self-hosted runner accepts public-fork PR -> arbitrary code on org infrastructure.
indicators: runs-on: self-hosted on a public repo

secret_exfil_via_log.description: echo of secret to step output / annotation -> visible in build logs.
